name: mc-agent-oof
description: Minecraft hurt sounds when your build, lint, or test fails — and a level-up ding when it goes green.

interface.longDescription: Plays the iconic Minecraft hurt sound when a command fails (lint/test errors), an explosion for build failures, an anvil drop for segfaults and panics, and a level-up ding the moment a previously-failing command goes green again.
defaultPrompt: Use $mc-agent-oof while running my build commands.
Play Minecraft hurt sounds when things break.
